intended_use: BriefCase-Triage is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of CT images with or without contrast that include the ribs, in adults or transitio
intended_use_full: BriefCase-Triage is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of CT images with or without contrast that include the ribs, in adults or transitional adolescents aged 18 and older. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and appropriately trained medical specialists in workflow triage by flagging and communicating suspect cases of three or more acute Rib fracture (RibFx) pathologies.
ground_truth: Three senior board-certified radiologists serving as ground truth reviewers
other_metrics: Positive Likelihood Ratio: 19.149 (95% CI: 10.594-35.595); Negative Likelihood Ratio: 0.051 (95% CI: 0.021-0.119); Mean time-to-notification: 41.4 seconds (95% CI: 40.4-42.5) compared to predicate device 70.1 seconds (95% CI: 64.9-75.4)
